mapper.select: SELECT * FROM body_measurement WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND record_date = #{recordDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO body_measurement (user_id, record_date, chest_cm, waist_cm, left_arm_cm, right_arm_cm, left_thigh_cm, right_thigh_cm, hip_cm, neck_cm, note) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recordDate}, #{chestCm}, #{waistCm}, #{leftArmCm}, #{rightArmCm}, #{leftThighCm}, #{rightThighCm}, #{hipCm}, #{neckCm}, #{note})
